title: Add website blog on how SaaS teams should run a daily AI operations review
summary: Records release evidence for publishing a supporting website blog that teaches SaaS teams a short daily AI operations review: start with the active issue, inspect traces before changing prompts, routes, or budgets, and leave with one owner and one concrete next move.
completed_todo_items: Publish a public website blog explaining how SaaS teams should run a daily AI operations review.
Support the Action Center positioning with an operational article that links daily triage, trace review, customer impact, and concrete next actions.

tests.notes: The blog route was verified against a temporary next dev server. A full next build remains blocked locally by the known unrelated Windows/Next prerender module-resolution issue on existing compare and announcement routes.

commands: GET /blog/how-saas-teams-should-run-a-daily-ai-operations-review on a temporary next dev server
smoke_or_visibility.notes: The route returned successfully and rendered the article title.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the blog-content entry and this release-evidence manifest if the daily operations review positioning or SEO framing needs to be rewritten.
